debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ

hxlt : x < ↑n + 1
⊢ ∏ p ∈ ⌊x⌋.natAbs.primesBelow, ∑' (k : ℕ), (↑p ^ k)⁻¹ ≤
    ↑(∏ k ∈ Icc 1 (primeCountingReal x), nth Nat.Prime k / (nth Nat.Prime k - 1))
